success_outcomes.text: Calling the rest of the patrol over, the cats discuss their next move. If a badger has moved in, they need to confirm it. p_l comes up with a plan — pushing loose rocks in front of the sett's mouth. The cats will be able to come back tomorrow to see if anything has shoved them out of the way.

Wisely, the patrol retreats back to camp.

success_outcomes.text: Alright, gather round. p_l is here to tell the cats on the patrol an old story, an ancient, worn-thin tale of the loners who come at the call of any who sleep in a circle of mushrooms. These cats had metal shards in their eyes and moss growing among their fur; they were unnatural loners with the power to grant protection — or vengeance.

log.cats_from: cat_from and cat_to enjoyed a training patrol together in which p_l told a story of the moss cats.

success_outcomes.text: It's old superstition, p_l explains. The moss-pelted cats called by these circles are powerful — but brutal. If their summoner has rogue-thoughts, the moss cats will open their maws, glistening metal teeth ready to take vengeance on cats who break their word and hold cowardice in their hearts. Not that app1 would ever earn their ire, of course.

The other cats of StarClan leapt to battle and tore a hole in Silverpelt, casting out the traitor, condemning them to walk a path of decay and cruelty.
